message:
Sync beads database: fsfs epic (bd-2hz), new feature issues, priority promotions

Export beads issue database after planning session that added 69 new
issues and promoted 12 existing subtasks from P1 to P0. No issues were
removed or closed; all 115 prior issues are retained unchanged (aside
from the priority promotions noted below).

New epic — bd-2hz: "Build frankensearch-fast-search (fsfs)":
  A standalone machine-wide search product built on the frankensearch
  library. Decomposed into 11 workstreams with detailed subtasks:
  - bd-2hz.1:  Product semantics, decision contracts, safety model
  - bd-2hz.2:  Machine-wide corpus discovery, utility-aware ingestion
  - bd-2hz.3:  Incremental indexing and storage architecture
  - bd-2hz.4:  Adaptive compute-pressure control, graceful degradation
  - bd-2hz.5:  Query execution, ranking, explainability core
  - bd-2hz.6:  Agent-first CLI mode (JSON/TOON protocol ergonomics)
  - bd-2hz.7:  Deluxe FrankenTUI search interface (6 subtasks)
  - bd-2hz.8:  Evidence ledger, provenance, observability fabric
  - bd-2hz.9:  Extreme performance engineering, optimization loop
  - bd-2hz.10: Comprehensive testing, deterministic simulation, e2e
  - bd-2hz.11: Packaging, migration, rollout, operator documentation
  Each workstream is P0 with subtasks at P1.

New bd-2yu subtasks (7 issues):
  - bd-2yu.3.3: Host identity handshake and fallback attribution
  - bd-2yu.4.4: Anomaly materialization and SLO rollup tables
  - bd-2yu.5.8: Host-adapter SDK and conformance harness
  - bd-2yu.6.4: Operator view presets, density modes, progressive disclosure
  - bd-2yu.7.5: Alerts/SLO health and capacity-forecast screens
  - bd-2yu.8.5: Long-duration soak tests with leak detection
  - bd-2yu.9.3: Operator usability pilot with feedback loop

New standalone search-feature issues (15 issues, P1-P3):
  P1: Incremental append-only FSVI index updates (bd-1hw)
  P2: Per-hit explanations (bd-11n), quality-tier circuit breaker
      (bd-1do), typed filter predicates (bd-26e), PRF query expansion
      (bd-3st), embedding batch coalescing (bd-i37), soft-delete
      tombstones (bd-sot), MMR diversified ranking (bd-z3j)
  P3: MRL adaptive dimensionality (bd-1b8), index warm-up/prefault
      (bd-1co), negative/exclusion query syntax (bd-2n6), multi-index
      federated search (bd-2rq), implicit relevance feedback (bd-2tv),
      prefix-optimized incremental search (bd-2u4), embedding-stable
      document fingerprinting (bd-yrq)

Priority promotions (12 existing bd-2yu subtasks, P1 → P0):
  bd-2yu.1.1, bd-2yu.1.2, bd-2yu.2.1, bd-2yu.2.2, bd-2yu.2.3,
  bd-2yu.3.1, bd-2yu.4.1, bd-2yu.4.2, bd-2yu.4.3, bd-2yu.5.1,
  bd-2yu.5.2, bd-2yu.6.1
  These represent the foundational subtasks across the first six
  bd-2yu workstreams, now elevated to reflect their blocking status
  on downstream work.

Issue count: 115 → 184 (+69 net new, 0 removed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
